email_subject: Sollicitatie — Social Media Manager (Odoo platform user)
email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Social Media Manager bij Odoo. Uw platform, dat social media, pushmeldingen en live chat in één dashboard verenigt, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en interesses.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, beheer ik content en bouw ik websites in WordPress. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com sociale media (Instagram/Facebook) geïntegreerd en gestructureerde data geïmplementeerd. Ik ben gewend om meerdere kanalen te coördineren en rapportages te maken met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush.

Hoewel mijn ervaring met Odoo nog beperkt is, leer ik snel nieuwe platforms en tools. Mijn technische achtergrond helpt me om de functionaliteiten van Odoo snel onder de knie te krijgen. Ik spreek Engels en Turks vloeiend, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen om te verbeteren).

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the position of Social Media Manager at Odoo. Your platform, which unifies social media, push notifications, and live chat in one dashboard, aligns perfectly with my experience and interests.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, manage content, and build websites in WordPress. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I integrated social media (Instagram/Facebook) and implemented structured data. I am used to coordinating multiple channels and creating reports using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush.

Although my experience with Odoo is still limited, I quickly learn new platforms and tools. My technical background helps me master Odoo's functionalities rapidly. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons to improve).

I look forward to explaining my motivation and skills in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Toen ik de vacature voor Social Media Manager bij Odoo zag, was ik meteen enthousiast. Uw visie om social media, pushmeldingen en live chat in één dashboard te verenigen, spreekt mij aan omdat ik geloof in efficiëntie en overzicht. Mijn ervaring als junior digital marketer en mijn technische achtergrond maken mij een sterke kandidaat voor deze rol.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogcontent en het bouwen en onderhouden van websites in WordPress. Ik werk dagelijks met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com sociale media (Instagram/Facebook) geïntegreerd en gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) geïmplementeerd, wat aantoont dat ik zowel content als techniek kan combineren.

Hoewel ik nog geen directe ervaring heb met Odoo, ben ik gewend om snel nieuwe platforms te leren. Mijn ervaring met WordPress, Elementor en diverse analysetools geeft mij een solide basis om Odoo's social media module onder de knie te krijgen. Ik ben leergierig en pas me snel aan.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Odoo is de focus op gebruiksgemak en het samenbrengen van functies. Ik wil graag bijdragen aan het beheren van sociale kanalen, het monitoren van engagement en het optimaliseren van content. Mijn communicatieve vaardigheden in Engels en Turks, en mijn groeiende Nederlands, stellen mij in staat om met een divers publiek te werken.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

When I saw the vacancy for Social Media Manager at Odoo, I was immediately enthusiastic. Your vision to unify social media, push notifications, and live chat in one dashboard appeals to me because I believe in efficiency and overview. My experience as a junior digital marketer and my technical background make me a strong candidate for this role.

At Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blog content, and building and maintaining websites in WordPress. I work daily with tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, on mirook.com I integrated social media (Instagram/Facebook) and implemented structured data (JSON-LD), demonstrating that I can combine both content and technology.

Although I do not yet have direct experience with Odoo, I am used to learning new platforms quickly. My experience with WordPress, Elementor, and various analytics tools gives me a solid foundation to master Odoo's social media module. I am eager to learn and adapt quickly.

What appeals to me about Odoo is the focus on ease of use and bringing functions together. I want to contribute to managing social channels, monitoring engagement, and optimizing content. My communication skills in English and Turkish, and my growing Dutch, enable me to work with a diverse audience.

I hope to explain my motivation further in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Social media content & integration (Instagram/Facebook) on mirook.com
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content management at Episto
- Proficient in analytics tools: Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Search Console
- Technical foundation: WordPress, structured data, JSON-LD schema
- Quick learner of new platforms; fluent in English and Turkish, Dutch B1
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Social media: social media content & integration (Instagram, Facebook)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
